form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last in a T3 RSTW on April 10 over 300m at Healesville behind Ronaldo Jack beaten 6 lengths (17.35). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Improved sharply when second behind You Found Me at Healesville last start over 300m (17.16). Likely to play a major role.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th over 400m at Warragul beaten 12 lengths (23.85) behind Whispering Tiger in a T3 Grade 6 on April 9. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2.5 lengths second (25.83) over 450m at Ballarat and making it two placings on end. Should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Shepparton (22.94) in a T3 Grade 6, finishing a 6 length fifth. Still a maiden from this draw but has never missed the frame from three starts. Others appear better placed.
